text_excerpt: News | Julian Smith MP Skip to main content Main navigation Home About Julian News Julian's Priorities Parliament Contact News Julian Smith MP visits Glasshouses Community Primary School Wednesday, 29 April, 2026 Rt Hon Sir Julian Smith MP visited Glasshouses Community Primary School on Friday 24 April, meeting pupils to talk about his work as the local Member of Parliament and to congratulate the school on its successful road safety campaign. During the visit, Julian spoke with pupils about what it is like to represent Skipton and Ripon in Parliament, answering questions on democracy, the role of an MP...
